messages.membershipCanceled: Membership will be canceled at the end of the billing period
messages.resetLinkSent: If that email exists, a password reset link will be sent shortly.

newOrderAssigned.title: New Order Assigned
newOrderAssigned.body: You have been assigned a new service order.

providerFound.title: Provider Found
providerFound.body: A provider has been assigned to your order.

searchingProvider.title: Searching for Provider
searchingProvider.body: We are still looking for a provider in your area. We will notify you once one is found.

providerAccepted.title: Provider Accepted
providerAccepted.body: Your service provider has confirmed the order.

providerReassignment.title: Provider Reassignment
providerReassignment.body: Your provider could not take the order. We are finding a new one.

serviceStarted.title: Service Started
serviceStarted.body: Your service provider has started working on your order.

serviceCompleted.title: Service Completed
serviceCompleted.body: Your service has been completed. Please rate your provider.

appointmentConfirmed.title: Appointment Confirmed
appointmentConfirmed.body: Your provider has confirmed the scheduled appointment.

rescheduleRequested.title: Reschedule Requested
rescheduleRequested.body: Your provider has proposed a new time for the appointment.

providerReassignmentAppointment.title: Provider Reassignment
providerReassignmentAppointment.body: Your provider could not take the scheduled appointment. We are finding a new one.

membershipExpiringSoon.title: Membership Expiring Soon
membershipExpiringSoon.body: Your membership expires on {{date}}. Renew to keep receiving orders.

membershipExpired.title: Membership Expired
membershipExpired.body: Your membership has expired. Renew to continue receiving orders.

orderStartedProvider.title: Order started
orderStartedProvider.body: The customer approved you. The service is now in progress.

orderStartedCustomer.title: Order started
orderStartedCustomer.body: Your order is now in progress.

serviceCompletedProvider.title: Order completed
serviceCompletedProvider.body: The order has been marked completed.

newRatingFromCustomer.title: New rating
newRatingFromCustomer.body: A customer has left a star rating for you.
